body_preview: - Graph pressure: `state_run_unmatched_non_validation_completed_count=2` — 2 sessions completed with error status but no FailureObserved events. - Assessment: `yyds state why last-failure` reports "3 error runs without FailureObserved events" and "1 incomplete run (13,938 minutes stale)." - Assessment self-tests: `yyds state doctor` confirms 107K events, SQL
expected_evidence: `state_run_unmatched_non_validation_completed_count` gnome drops from 2 toward 0. `yyds state tail --limit 50` shows newly appended FailureObserved events with matching run_ids. Task lineage shows `scripts/append_terminal_state_events.py` in the changed files. Detailed description: The script `scripts/append_terminal_state_events.py` was built on Day 127 to
title: Close historical state lifecycle gaps — retroactively add FailureObserved for error runs
